titleZh: 从公司债权人角度看新《公司法》下股东责任与风险
titleEn: Shareholder Liability and Risks from the Viewpoint of Corporate Creditors under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 从债权人保护与公司资本充实角度梳理股东责任规则变化，重点讨论加速到期、补充赔偿责任、人格否认与实质董事风险。
abstractEn: Examines amended shareholder-liability rules and creditor-protection concerns, with practical recommendations for disputes involving capital, liquidation, and control abuse.
